config.role: Mobile Developer · Backend Developer · AI Enthusiast
config.bio: I build mobile apps and backend APIs, integrate payments (Stripe), and work on AI tooling & automation. I care deeply about clean architecture, performance, and shipping reliable products.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.desc: Fetched live from GitHub · sorted by most recently updated.

services.label: What I do
services.desc: I work as a freelance engineer and consultant, helping teams build exceptional mobile and backend products.
services.cta_desc: Let's talk about your next project.

0.title: Mobile App Development
0.description: Cross-platform Flutter, React Native apps and native iOS/Android apps with Kotlin (Jetpack Compose) or Swift. Pixel-perfect UI, offline-first, and app-store ready.

1.title: Backend & API Development
1.description: Scalable REST APIs with NestJS, clean architecture, Stripe payment integration, webhooks, and robust authentication.

2.title: AI & Automation
2.description: AI-powered tooling, workflow automation, computer-vision pipelines (360° panorama stitching), and LLM integrations.

3.title: Technical Consulting
3.description: Architecture reviews, code audits, CI/CD setup, and mentoring. I help teams ship reliable products faster.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.desc: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? Fill out the form below — it opens your email client with everything pre-filled.

form.note: This opens your default email client with the message pre-filled. No data is stored or sent to any server.
